disposition.reason: The saved model passes all ten named cases and preserves six activation behaviors, but it does not execute the claimed multiple-settlement AggregateError branch. The current product also reads cleanup_business_state_mutation_count 1 against threshold 0.

validator_checker.failure: All eight candidate hashes and checkpoint shape checks passed before a line-wrapped canonical-skill phrase check returned 1. The saved checker was corrected for future replay and was not rerun.

exact_wall_reads.evidence: current runtime status and record status become finishing on ordinary close; durable status remains open and commit count remains 0
the inherited independent activation replay preserves sibling runtime and tag isolation at 6 of 6 behaviors
current Runtime owns attempts and controllers; existing Lite close already awaits LIFO execution and reverse-resolution resource cleanup; no Lite primitive is proposed
this independent validator rejects the unexecuted aggregation claim and does not accept the writer checkpoint
writes are confined to workers/validator-dkr-1-cleanup and the governed worker report
the current breach, failed validator checker, and missing multiple-error case remain explicit and blocking

audit_traces.evidence: The checker printed checkpointFields=20/20 and wallEntries=6/6, then exited 1 on an unrelated line-wrapped skill phrase. Fail closed: the shape claim is not accepted from a failed checker.

audit_traces.check: Ordinary current product cleanup does not mutate session business state.
Verified discovery alone authorizes a product-changing remediation while the current wall is breached.
audit_traces.evidence: Canonical rules allow breached-wall learning to be saved only with downstream blocked, require every wall held for downstream work, and pause committing moves on breaking until a recorded in-frame resolution. This validator cannot create that resolution.

remediation_authority.reason: A DKR can preserve useful learning while blocked. It cannot authorize a committing move through a breached wall. Only the orchestrator may proceed after a recorded in-frame breaking resolution that does not weaken the threshold or action envelope.

required_next_evidence: Add a saved executable case with two rejected settlement promises and assertions for AggregateError and its complete errors list.
Replay the corrected validator checker once as a new verification attempt; do not rewrite this failed trace.
Keep downstream progression blocked until the cleanup wall has a recorded in-frame resolution under the canonical skill.
